summary: A small rectangular bunker or storage structure with a flat roof, featuring a brick and stone exterior with a white concrete foundation. The building has a single dark wooden entrance door and is partially sunken into the ground with a raised concrete platform around it.
rebuild_hints: Sink structure partially into ground, leaving ~2-3 blocks above surface
Build white concrete foundation platform around perimeter
Construct brick walls with horizontal stonebrick trim bands
Add dark wood door frame and door on one long side, centered
Top with flat dark wood roof with slight overhang
Ensure symmetrical appearance from all sides
Add subtle weathering or moss on lower brick sections
uncertainties: Exact interior dimensions and depth below ground level uncertain
Precise block count for height due to perspective variation
Whether structure is fully hollow or has internal features
Exact shade and pattern of brick arrangement on hidden sides
Whether roof has any internal structure or is solid
